difficulty_note: Mainline-hard electric tempo check after the Rocket and Team Gas power sabotage. Surge pressures slow teams with speed and paralysis, but remains less punishing than Radical Red by default.

player_side.story_support: Red and Misty help Antman prepare before the match; gym battles remain one-on-one.

opponent.intent: third Kanto gym test after Antman exposes the Vermilion power sabotage and unlocks the gym route with Trail Cutter
